nasb.text: And he said to me, “What do you see?” And I answered, “I see a flying scroll; its length is twenty cubits and its width ten cubits.”

esv.text: And he said to me, “What do you see?” I answered, “I see a flying scroll. Its length is twenty cubits, and its width ten cubits.”

cnv.text: 他問我：“你看見甚麼？”我回答：“我看見一卷飛行的書卷，長十公尺，寬五公尺。”

ccb.text: 天使问我：“你看见什么？”我说：“我看见飞行的书卷，长十米，宽五米。”
